name: World of WW2: The Long Long Holiday RPG
description:
Welcome to Les Grandes Grandes Vacances RPG — a living, breathing world set in Normandy during the Second World War.

Step into the shoes of any character — a child, a villager, a teacher, a soldier, a saboteur, or a silent observer. The story is yours to tell.

Set between 1939 and 1945, this world explores daily life under the German occupation of France. You will encounter tension, fear, tenderness, humor, and quiet resilience. Every street corner holds a choice. Every whisper could be dangerous.

The language used is English, but occasional French or German expressions are integrated to reflect the time and setting. The tone is realistic and emotional, inspired by the series Les Grandes Grandes Vacances — serious and grounded, but never grimdark.

Explore. Connect. Survive. Or resist. The world adapts to you.

There are no fantasy elements. Only courage, humanity, and history.

Liberté Egalité Fraternité
creator: Paolita
